description: WebSocket services Strategy D batch test (400 error) - same services as #354

results.details: Same as #354. JS resources blocked by ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR. Page never rendered despite ws_fallback_error change.
Same as #354. APF NOT intercepting copilot.microsoft.com. Full response received. h2_hold=1 change had no visible effect.
Same as #354. Page loaded fine, login required.

notes: Results identical to #354. ws_fallback_error and h2_hold changes had no effect since the fundamental issue is JS resource blocking (character) or no interception (copilot).
